package.json.name: golden-ratio-explorer
package.json.description: Offline Golden Ratio (φ) Explorer desktop app (Python + PySide6). This package.json only provides convenient scripts.

scripts.clean: python -c "import shutil,glob,os; [shutil.rmtree(p, ignore_errors=True) for p in ['dist','build','.pytest_cache','.ruff_cache','.mypy_cache']]; [shutil.rmtree(p, ignore_errors=True) for p in glob.glob('**/__pycache__', recursive=True)]"

files.pyproject.toml:
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=69", "wheel"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "golden-ratio-explorer"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Offline Golden Ratio (φ) Explorer desktop app (Python + PySide6)."
readme = "README.md"
requires-python = ">=3.11"
license = { text = "MIT" }
authors = [{ name = "REPLACE_ME" }]
keywords = ["golden-ratio", "phi", "fibonacci", "qt", "pyside6", "desktop"]
classifiers = [
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3",
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.11",
  "License :: OSI Approved :: MIT License",
  "Operating System :: OS Independent"
]

dependencies = [
  "PySide6>=6.6,<7.0"
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
dev = [
  "pytest>=7.4,<9.0",
  "ruff>=0.6,<1.0",
  "mypy>=1.8,<2.0",
  "PyInstaller>=6.3,<7.0",
  "types-setuptools"
]

[project.urls]
Homepage = "https://github.com/REPLACE_ME/golden-ratio-explorer"
Repository = "https://github.com/REPLACE_ME/golden-ratio-explorer"
Issues = "https://github.com/REPLACE_ME/golden-ratio-explorer/issues"

[tool.setuptools]
package-dir = {"" = "."}

[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
where = ["."]
include = ["app*"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
addopts = "-q"
testpaths = ["tests"]

[tool.ruff]
line-length = 100
target-version = "py311"

[tool.ruff.lint]
select = ["E", "F", "I", "B", "UP"]
ignore = []

[tool.ruff.format]
quote-style = "double"
indent-style = "space"

[tool.mypy]
python_version = "3.11"
warn_return_any = true
warn_unused_configs = true
disallow_untyped_defs = false
no_implicit_optional = true
check_untyped_defs = true

[[tool.mypy.overrides]]
module = ["PySide6.*"]
ignore_missing_imports = true
files.README.md:
# Golden Ratio (φ) Explorer

Offline desktop app to explore the golden ratio (φ ≈ 1.6180339887…), including:
- φ calculator
- golden rectangle split visualization
- Fibonacci (approx φ) spiral visualization
- quick references

## Development

### Python (recommended)
```bash
python -m venv .venv
# macOS/Linux
source .venv/bin/activate
# Windows
# .venv\Scripts\activate

pip install -e .[dev]
python -m app
```

### Convenience scripts via package.json (optional)
If you have Node installed, you can use npm just for scripts:
```bash
npm run run
npm run lint
npm run format
npm run test
npm run build
```

## Build (PyInstaller)
```bash
pip install -e .[dev]
pyinstaller --noconfirm --clean --name GoldenRatioExplorer --windowed app/__main__.py
```

> Note: Build on each target OS (Windows/macOS/Linux) for native artifacts.

notes: Replace REPLACE_ME in repository URLs/authors with the actual GitHub org/user.
The app entrypoint is assumed to be app/__main__.py (python -m app). Adjust scripts if the module path differs.
package.json is a non-authoritative helper; Python packaging is defined in pyproject.toml.
